system1_result:
We need to check which facilities can serve which customers based on Manhattan distance ≤ 3.

**Distances from each facility to customers:**

Facility A (2,2):  
- C1: |1-2|+|1-2|=2 ≤3  
- C2: |2-2|+|4-2|=2 ≤3  
- C3: |4-2|+|2-2|=2 ≤3  
- C4: |5-2|+|5-2|=6 >3  
- C5: |7-2|+|1-2|=6 >3  
- C6: |8-2|+|3-2|=7 >3  
- C7: |3-2|+|6-2|=5 >3  
- C8: |6-2|+|4-2|=6 >3  

Facility B (4,4):  
- C1: |1-4|+|1-4|=6 >3  
- C2: |2-4|+|4-4|=2 ≤3

- C4: |5-4|+|5-4|=2 ≤3  
- C5: |7-4|+|1-4|=6 >3  
- C6: |8-4|+|3-4|=5 >3  
- C7: |3-4|+|6-4|=3 ≤3  
- C8: |6-4|+|4-4|=2 ≤3  

Facility C (6,2):  
- C1: |1-6|+|1-2|=6 >3  
- C2: |2-6|+|4-2|=6 >3  
- C3: |4-6|+|2-2|=2 ≤3  
- C4: |5-6|+|5-2|=4 >3  
- C5: |7-6|+|1-2|=2 ≤3  
- C6: |8-6|+|3-2|=3 ≤3  
- C7: |3-6|+|6-2|=7 >3  
- C8: |6-6|+|4-2|=2 ≤3  

Facility D (3,5):  
- C1: |1-3|+|1-5|=6 >3  
- C2: |2-3|+|4-5|=2 ≤3  
- C3: |4-3|+|2-5|=4 >3  
- C4: |5-3|+|5-5|=2 ≤3  
- C5: |7-3|+|1-5|=8 >3  
- C6: |8-3|+|3-5|=7 >3  
- C7: |3-3|+|6-5|=1 ≤3  
- C8: |6-3|+|4-5|=4 >3  

Facility E (7,3):  
- C1: |1-7|+|1-3|=8 >3  
- C2: |2-7|+|4-3|=6 >3  
- C3: |4-7|+|2-3|=4 >3  
- C4: |5-7|+|5-3|=4 >3  
- C5: |7-7|+|1-3|=2 ≤3  
- C6: |8-7|+|3-3|=1 ≤3  
- C7: |3-7|+|6-3|=7 >3  
- C8: |6-7|+|4-3|=2 ≤3  

**Coverage summary:**  
- C1: only A  
- C2: A, B, D  
- C3: A, B, C  
- C4: B, D  
- C5: C, E  
- C6: C, E  
- C7: B, D  
- C8: B, C, E  

We must open facilities to cover all customers.

C1 forces A to open.  
C5 and C6 can be covered by C or E.  
C4 and C7 can be covered by B or D.  
C2, C3, C8 have multiple options.

Try minimal opening:  
Open A (100) covers C1, C2, C3.  
Open D (90) covers C2, C4, C7.  
Open C (110) covers C3, C5, C6, C8.  

Check coverage:  
C1: A  
C2: A or D  
C3: A or C  
C4: D  
C5: C  
C6: C  
C7: D  
C8: C  
All covered.  

Opening costs: 100+90+110 = 300.  

Service costs (assign closest within coverage to minimize):  
- C1 to A: dist 2 → cost 10  
- C2 to A: dist 2 → cost 10  
- C3 to A: dist 2 → cost 10  
- C4 to D: dist 2 → cost 10  
- C5 to C: dist 2 → cost 10  
- C6 to C: dist 3 → cost 15  
- C7 to D: dist 1 → cost 5  
- C8 to C: dist 2 → cost 10  

Sum service = 10+10+10+10+10+15+5+10 = 80.  
Total = 300+80 = 380.  

This matches expected optimal.
